title: Medal of Redemption

The '''Medal of Redemption''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot medal awarded in the wake of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] - the Imperial Navy's redemption for their previous failure to defend the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. It was awarded for completing one tour of duty. Maarek Stele specifically was presented with the medal for his actions at [[Aftermath of Hoth|preventing]] any Rebels from using high-traffic lanes to blend in in the aftermath of Hoth.

==Design==
The ribbon was primarily red, with a blue stripe at the center that splits into four nearing the top in a manner similar to a fan. The medal itself was gold, with six bars jutting out, three on each side, plus two silver-colored mandibles at the bottom. At the center of the medal was a blue gem that featured the Imperial Crest emblazoned in gold.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
